mapper.insert:
insert into pr_import_heat_temp (org_name, building_name, room_num, meter_name, specification, model, meter_serial, meter_num, card_num, imei, dtu_num, dtu_type, concentrator_code, chan_num, device_id, caliber, company_id, create_by, type, create_time) values
(#{item.orgName}, #{item.buildingName}, #{item.roomNum}, #{item.meterName}, #{item.specification}, #{item.model}, #{item.meterSerial}, #{item.meterNum}, #{item.cardNum}, #{item.imei}, #{item.dtuNum}, #{item.dtuType}, #{item.concentratorCode}, #{item.chanNum}, #{item.deviceId}, #{item.caliber}, #{item.companyId}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.type}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.update: update pr_import_heat_temp a left join pr_house b on a.room_num = b.room_num set a.house_id = b.id, a.org_id = b.org_id where a.company_id = #{companyId} and a.type = '0' and a.create_by = #{create} and b.company_id = #{companyId} and b.is_deleted = '0'

update pr_import_heat_temp a left join mt_meter_match b on a.company_id = b.company_id left join mt_heat_temp_archive mha on b.archive_id = mha.id set a.meter_arc_code = mha.code, a.archive_id = mha.id where a.company_id = #{companyId} and a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0' and b.meter_type = '04' and a.meter_name = mha.name
mapper.select: select * from pr_import_heat_temp where company_id = #{companyId} and create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and (meter_num is null or meter_num = '') limit 500
select * from pr_import_heat_temp where company_id = #{companyId} and create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and archive_id is null limit 500
select count(1) from pr_import_heat_temp where company_id = #{companyId} and create_by = #{create} and type = '0'
select org_name, building_name, room_num from pr_house where company_id = #{companyId} and org_id = #{orgId} and is_deleted = '0'
mapper.delete: delete from pr_import_heat_temp where company_id = #{companyId} and create_by = #{create} and type = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into pr_heat_temp_archive (id, company_id, org_id, house_id, archive_id, meter_arc_code, meter_arc_name, meter_num, card_num, imei_num, dtu_num, dtu_type, chan_num, device_id, meter_serial, concentrator_code, caliber, specification, model, create_by, create_time) select replace(uuid(), '-', ''), company_id, org_id, house_id, archive_id, meter_arc_code, meter_name, meter_num, card_num, imei, dtu_num, dtu_type, chan_num, device_id, meter_serial, concentrator_code, caliber, specification, model, create_by, create_time from pr_import_heat_temp where company_id = #{companyId} and create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and house_id is not null and archive_id is not null
mapper.delete: delete from pr_import_heat_temp where company_id = #{companyId} and create_by = #{create}
